content.body:
Each adapter (claude, codex, cline) now embeds a YAML capability file
declaring which MRP v0 events it natively supports vs experimental.
AdapterCapability type and Capabilities() method added to the Adapter
interface; all three adapters implement it via //go:embed.
Unit tests verify correct supports/experimental lists per adapter.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(mrp): add adapter capability YAMLs and Capabilities() interface method
